passives.name: Enlighten
passives.effects: Upon leveling up, restores {{as|20% of '''maximum''' mana}} over 3 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Upon leveling up, restores {{as 20% of '''maximum''' mana}} over 3 seconds.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution-semantics review: Enlighten triggers on level-up events and restores mana as a timed recovery over 3 seconds rather than an instant refill.
Player-visible behavior: leveling up shows a short post-level mana refill window equal to 20% of maximum mana.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Lost Chapter
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Enlighten trigger timing and 20%-of-maximum-mana-over-3-seconds restoration behavior
